title: [Skyship, The Sands]
description: Lines of black wooden benches flank long, horizontal strips of packed sand across a stone floor.  Colored a bright vermillion and sectioned off with bright white paint, the sand is also splotched with darker flecks of long-dried crimson that similarly dot the adjacent benches.  Above, a series of lanterns are placed in suspended cages, casting the area in a perpetual, ethereal glow.
